name: BLE ADV Proxy
author: Ava
description: Bidirectional raw BLE advertising proxy for ha-ble-adv. Scan nearby BLE broadcasts and send control packets to ceiling fans or lamps.
detail_description: esphome-ble_adv_proxy port for ha-ble-adv. Requires Ava Bluetooth detect or ESPHome BT proxy scan. Exposes ble_adv_proxy_name for ha-ble-adv adapter discovery.

config.label: Enable BLE ADV Proxy
config.description: Expose ble_adv_proxy services and events to Home Assistant.

config.label: Max TX Power
config.description: Use highest BLE advertise TX power when sending control packets.

config.label: Raw HCI (root, 1:1)
config.description: Root only. Inject the full raw PDU (Flags included) via HCI/MGMT for true 1:1 with ha-ble-adv. Needs a device whose Bluetooth uses the kernel HCI transport; otherwise auto-falls back to AdvertiseData.

config.label: Show Proxy Ready Sensor
config.description: Expose proxy ready status in Home Assistant. Off by default.

config.label: Show Last Advertise Error Sensor
config.description: Expose the last BLE advertise failure reason in Home Assistant. Off by default.

config.label: Adapter Name
config.description: Optional unique adapter name for ha-ble-adv. Leave blank to use the Ava device name.
